data.text:
Hi,

Greetings from Brightlight Production.

We’re sharing our Cinematography & Color Grading Showreel.

At Brightlight Production, we specialize in cinematic visuals for feature films, music videos, commercials, and digital content. Our team provides professional cinematography and color grading services using a fully equipped Blackmagic Cinema Camera 6K Full Frame cinema rig, ready for feature film and commercial productions.

We would love the opportunity to collaborate on your upcoming projects.

Showreel:
https://youtu.be/twBIIFxX7HE?si=Euq_IxRF8YxW3FuR

We look forward to connecting with you.

Best regards,

Yawan Kaushik
Manager
Brightlight Production
